tasks.label: Build and Run Active C++ File
args: $dir = Split-Path -Parent '${file}'; $name = [IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension('${file}'); $out = Join-Path $dir 'output'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; g++ '${file}' -o (Join-Path $out ($name + '.exe')); if ($?) { & (Join-Path $out ($name + '.exe')) }
